title: Segfault running synthesis on Raptor64 CPU core

features.name: unpacked memory array with blocking assignment
features.description: Code should include an unpacked memory array (2D array) where individual elements are assigned using blocking assignments within an always block

features.name: multi-module CPU design with memory arrays
features.description: Code should include a multi-module design where multiple modules contain memory arrays and are instantiated together in a parent module
